scripts.check: npm run toolchain:preflight && node --check field-constants.mjs && node --check field-probe-corpus.mjs && node --check field-f32-oracle.mjs && node --check mechanism-evidence.mjs && node --check field-bundle.mjs && node --check field-bake.mjs && node --check browser-app.js && node --check capture-hook.mjs && node --check capture.mjs && node --check route-contract.mjs && node --check route-entry.mjs && node --check validate-field-contract.mjs && node --check validate-field-mutations.mjs && node --check validate-routes.mjs && node --check validate-generated-biome-fields.mjs && node --check generated-biome-fields-browser.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run check && npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
